name: Sour Cream & Raisin Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine light sour cream, flour, sugar, salt, lemon juice, and vanilla. Process until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a small saucepan and stir over medium heat until it thickens. Remove from heat and add raisins, allowing them to cool for a few minutes.
3. Dip one side of a won-ton wrapper in the slightly beaten egg white; this side will be the outside.
4. Place about 1 heaping teaspoon of the raisin and sour cream mixture in the center of the won-ton wrapper.
5. Bring all four corners of the wrapper together at the top and press lightly with your fingers to seal.
6. Place the puffs on a baking sheet sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
7. Repeat steps 3-6 for the remaining wrappers.
8. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown.
